_description: Canonical agent metadata — hooks read from here instead of hardcoding names
_schema_version_notes: v2 (agent-trace lifecycle contract): adds non_fixer_agents, recovery_forbidden, lead_merge_aggregate_agents; hard_gates use structured predicates (pass_self / validated_fallback / aggregate_ok) rather than blanket field-value ORs. See .claude/patterns/agent-trace-protocol.md.

traces.missing_error: design-critic.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
ux-journeyer.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
security-defender.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
security-attacker.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
solve-critic.json trace not found -- cannot validate change challenge (solve_depth=full)

_hard_gates_docs: Rules block verify-report-gate from allowing hard_gate_failure:false when ANY of them fires. v2 gates use structured predicates (see _hard_gates_predicate_docs) that make recovery an audit marker validated by evidence, not a blanket fail trigger.

_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_self_pass_or_fail: verdict in {pass,fail} AND provenance == self. For agents where a recorded fail is acceptable as long as it was self-reported.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_self_strict: verdict == pass AND provenance == self. For agents where anything but a clean self-reported pass requires investigation.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.validated_fallback: provenance in {recovery, self-degraded} AND recovery_validated == true. Acceptable replacement for pass_self_* when evidence confirms the verdict.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.aggregate_ok: provenance == lead-merge AND contributing_spawn_indexes present AND each contributing sibling trace satisfies either pass_self_* or validated_fallback.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.legacy_pass_no_recovery: verdict == pass AND recovery != true. Backward-compat predicate for traces missing provenance (pre-migration). Drops after legacy migration completes.

hard_gates._block_explanation: Blocked unless: (a) self-reported pass or fail, or (b) recovery/degraded with validated evidence, or (c) lead-merge aggregate where all siblings satisfy the rule, or (d) legacy pre-migration pass without recovery flag.

hard_gates._note: security-fixer is in recovery_forbidden — recovery provenance is refused by write-recovery-trace.sh. Only self / self-degraded / lead-merge paths are reachable.
quality-fixer is in recovery_forbidden — see security-fixer note.

_legacy_hard_gates_v1: The v1 block_rules form is preserved below only for reference during migration. Do not read from it — verify-report-gate.sh reads hard_gates (v2) above.
